languages.text: "На гнойник похожи. На корнях назревают, из них рой плотоядного гнуса лезет. Чем раньше нарост уничтожишь, тем меньше этой гадости вылезет". {n}Сеть мелких укусов на плечах мужчины красноречиво намекает о размере упомянутых насекомых.{/n}

"Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}
languages.original_text: "На гнойник похожи. На корнях назревают, из них рой плотоядного гнуса лезет. Чем раньше нарост уничтожишь, тем меньше этой гадости вылезет". {n}Сеть мелких укусов на плечах мужчины красноречиво намекает о размере упомянутых насекомых.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Like a bunch of sores, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the outgrowth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A mesh of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

"Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

"There's no mistaking them when they start to grow. They look like a pustule from the side — and it's not far off. These growths on the roots mature, and then they burst. And, what do you know, they release swarms of flesh-eating gnats. But we have learned that if you damage a growth before it matures, the flies die off."

"Like a bunch of sores, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the outgrowth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A mesh of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

"Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

"Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

languages.text: 「それらが生え始めれば、見間違えようがない。横から見るとまるで膿疱だ──そして実際、その通りだ。根にできた瘤が成熟すると破裂し、肉を食うブヨの群れが放たれる。だが、成熟前にその瘤を傷つけておけば、あの虫は死に絶えることが分かった」
languages.original_text: "There's no mistaking them when they start to grow. They look like a pustule from the side — and it's not far off. These growths on the roots mature, and then they burst. And, what do you know, they release swarms of flesh-eating gnats. But we have learned that if you damage a growth before it matures, the flies die off."

traits.locale_text: 「それらが生え始めれば、見間違えようがない。横から見るとまるで膿疱だ──そして実際、その通りだ。根にできた瘤が成熟すると破裂し、肉を食うブヨの群れが放たれる。だが、成熟前にその瘤を傷つけておけば、あの虫は死に絶えることが分かった。」

languages.text: « Des sortes d'abcès qui poussent sur les racines avant de libérer un essaim de moucherons carnivores. Détruisez l'ergot le plus rapidement possible, ou ils n'en finiront plus d'éclore. » {n}Sur l'épaule de l'homme, une constellation de petites morsures témoignent de la taille approximative desdits insectes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Des sortes d'abcès qui poussent sur les racines avant de libérer un essaim de moucherons carnivores. Détruisez l'ergot le plus rapidement possible, ou ils n'en finiront plus d'éclore. » {n}Sur l'épaule de l'homme, une constellation de petites morsures témoignent de la taille approximative desdits insectes.{/n}

languages.text: "Bir sürü apse gibiler. Tam köklerin üzerinde olgunlaşıyor, sonra etobur tatarcık sürüsü fırlıyor. Uru erkenden parçalamak lazım yoksa daha fazlası yumurtadan çıkar." {n}Adamın omuzlarındaki küçük ısırık dizileri, böceklerin boyutuna işaret ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bir sürü apse gibiler. Tam köklerin üzerinde olgunlaşıyor, sonra etobur tatarcık sürüsü fırlıyor. Uru erkenden parçalamak lazım yoksa daha fazlası yumurtadan çıkar." {n}Adamın omuzlarındaki küçük ısırık dizileri, böceklerin boyutuna işaret ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Son parecidas a tumores. Maduran en las propias raíces y después liberan enjambres de mosquitos carnívoros. Destruya las pupas cuanto antes, de lo contrario engendrarán más de esos bastardos». {n}Te muestra un entramado de mordeduras diminutas en los hombros que sugiere el tamaño de estos insectos.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Son parecidas a tumores. Maduran en las propias raíces y después liberan enjambres de mosquitos carnívoros. Destruya las pupas cuanto antes, de lo contrario engendrarán más de esos bastardos». {n}Te muestra un entramado de mordeduras diminutas en los hombros que sugiere el tamaño de estos insectos.{/n}

languages.text: “就像一堆长在根上的脓疱，成熟了就会爆出一大群食肉飞虫。最好早点把增生体砸碎，不然就会越孵越多。”{n}从他肩膀上那片细密的咬痕来看，你可以想象到那些虫子有多少。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “就像一堆长在根上的脓疱，成熟了就会爆出一大群食肉飞虫。最好早点把增生体砸碎，不然就会越孵越多。”{n}从他肩膀上那片细密的咬痕来看，你可以想象到那些虫子有多少。{/n}

languages.text: "Sie sind wie Abszesse. Sie reifen an den Wurzeln, bis ein Schwarm Fleisch fressender Mücken aus ihnen hervorbricht. Zerstört die Auswüchse so schnell wie möglich, ehe noch mehr dieser Bastarde schlüpfen." {n}Ein Netz aus winzigen Bissen auf der Schulter des Mannes lässt die Größe der Insekten vermuten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Like a bunch of abscesses, they are. They ripen right on the roots, then a swarm of carnivorous midges bursts out. Smash the growth early, otherwise more of the bastards will hatch." {n}A web of small bites on the man's shoulders alludes to the size of the insects.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Sie sind wie Abszesse. Sie reifen an den Wurzeln, bis ein Schwarm Fleisch fressender Mücken aus ihnen hervorbricht.
